item.title: refine refinement context lost — retry_extra_prompt cleared by _run_retry_loop
item.intent: Ensure developer agent on a --refine pass receives the refinement hint so it pays attention to the updated spec
steps: In _run_retry_loop, do not reset retry_extra_prompt to empty — separate retry history clearing from initial context
Introduce an initial_dev_context variable passed from the caller that is included in dev_extra_prompt regardless of attempt number
In _run_developer_cycle, include initial_dev_context in dev_extra_prompt on attempt 0 (not just retries)
Verify developer agent log shows refinement hint on the refinement pass
acceptanceCriteria: Developer on a --refine pass receives the refinement hint in its prompt
retry_extra_prompt retry history still works correctly (no regression)
